subcodes.first_line: O thou who gazest upon the Most Exalted Horizon! In these few days of earthly life, burden not thyself with cares and longings for comfort [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ناظر بمنظر اعلی در این چند روزه حیات دنیا خود را بالایش و آرزوی آسایش
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @nearness and remoteness, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life
